problem id: 8e76c0d0
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) OR SHR(2)

examples:
  00001111 -> 11110011
  10000010 -> 00101000
  10111100 -> 11101111
  11011001 -> 10111111
  01000110 -> 01110101
  01010110 -> 01110101
  11001001 -> 10111110
  01111101 -> 11011111
  11010010 -> 00111101

query: 10101001
predicted answer: 10111010
